unscheduled_events.reason: No valid slot found after checking direct and backup options.
unscheduled_events.skip_adjustment: Reschedule within the same week if symptoms are stable; otherwise mark for manual review.

unscheduled_events.skip_adjustment: Move to the next free slot within 48 hours and lower intensity by one step.
